main_page.title: Manage your inventory and boost your sales through WhatsApp, all in one place.
main_page.subtitle_management: The easiest way to manage your inventory is to communicate with your suppliers and customers without having multiple platforms open.
main_page.subtitle_how_it_work: Set up in minutes and start managing without complications.
main_page.boxes_subtitle: Easily record product entries and exits in the system.
main_page.whats_subtitle: Communicate with clients and suppliers daily through the platform.
main_page.graph_subtitle: Gain access to charts of your inventory inflows and outflows for better management.
main_page.verified_subtitle: No app installation is required. If your team knows how to use WhatsApp, then they know how to use Zentory.
main_page.history_subtitle: Track all product entries and exits with detailed records

header.footer_subtitle: Simplified inventory management with manual control and integrated communication via WhatsApp.
